hero.art_prompt: Aisha, a 30 year old Indian woman in smart professional attire, poised and confident, leading a strategy discussion near a clean board, modern boardroom, aspirational.

panels.narration: Aisha was already good at leading people and plans at work.
panels.img_prompt: Aisha, 30, confidently leading a team discussion near a clean strategy board, poised and capable, modern office.

panels.narration: But the next step needed an MBA she did not have.
panels.dialogue: How do I lead at the top?
panels.img_prompt: Aisha looking thoughtful, wondering how to step up from managing to leading strategy at the top, laptop open, tidy office.

panels.narration: Then she found an online MBA in Strategy & Leadership.
panels.dialogue: I can grow without quitting my job!
panels.img_prompt: Aisha's face lighting up at a laptop showing an online MBA in Strategy and Leadership, warm hopeful glow.

panels.narration: Aisha enrolled and began leading with confidence.
panels.img_prompt: Aisha confidently starting her first strategy and leadership lesson on a laptop, notebook ready, focused and happy, warm light.

turn.title: Why An MBA In Strategy & Leadership
points: Master the real craft: corporate strategy, leadership, change management and decision-making.
Apply real AI tools for business from your very first semester.
₹2,00,000 for the full 2-year MBA (₹50,000/semester), with 0% interest EMI or a discount on upfront payment.
A UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ online MBA employers and promotions recognise.
